facilities.title: My Aged Care Sdn. Bhd
facilities.editorial_summary:
My Aged Care Sdn Bhd is the licensed corporate operator behind a cluster of residential nursing homes across Petaling Jaya, Selangor. The company runs multiple branches in PJ — including properties in PJS 7 (My Manor), Jalan Assunta, and PJ Old Town — along with a dedicated in-house physiotherapy unit branded MAC Physio Corner and an additional location in Ipoh, Perak. Founded in 2006 by medical professionals with a stated combined six decades of healthcare experience, the company holds nursing home licences under JKM's regulatory framework across its branch network. This listing represents the parent company entity rather than a specific branch with a physical reception to visit.

My Aged Care Sdn Bhd describes its service range as spanning general assisted living, nursing care for bedridden residents, post-stroke and post-operative rehabilitation, palliative support, and respite placements. An in-house physiotherapy service — branded MAC Physio Corner — operates across the network. The operator states it was founded by medical professionals with a combined six decades of healthcare experience. Monthly fees are not published on the myagedcare.com.my website; rates depend on care level and room type, and families should request a written fee schedule when making an initial enquiry.

For families considering My Aged Care, the first step is identifying which branch neighbourhood suits best — PJS 7, Jalan Assunta, PJ Old Town, and Ipoh each offer different physical settings and travel distances, while care standards and services are managed centrally. Contact the enquiry line via myagedcare.com.my to ask about availability at specific branches. When calling, specify the care level required — assisted living, full nursing, or rehabilitation — as this affects which branch and room type is suitable. Monthly fees vary by care tier and are not listed online, so ask for a written quote for the branch you are evaluating.

facilities.title: My Aged Care Nursing Home in PJ @ My Manor
facilities.editorial_summary:
My Aged Care's My Manor is located in PJS 7, Petaling Jaya, behind the MBPJ City Council building — a central, established residential area with manageable road access for family visits. The operator describes the property as occupying approximately 10,000 square feet with a low-density layout, meaning fewer residents per floor than typical multi-storey nursing homes. My Manor is the flagship branch of My Aged Care Sdn Bhd, a licensed nursing home operator founded in 2006, with sister branches across Jalan Assunta, PJ Old Town, and other PJ addresses.

My Aged Care Sdn Bhd describes its service range as spanning general assisted living, nursing care for bedridden residents, post-stroke and post-operative rehabilitation, palliative support, and respite placements. An in-house physiotherapy service — branded MAC Physio Corner — operates across the network. The operator states it was founded by medical professionals with a combined six decades of healthcare experience. Monthly fees are not published on the myagedcare.com.my website; rates depend on care level and room type, and families should request a written fee schedule when making an initial enquiry.

My Manor carries a 4.5-star Google rating from 142 reviews — one of the stronger review bases among PJ nursing homes. Google Maps classifies the facility under retirement home and home health care service. For families in the PJS, Subang, or Kelana Jaya areas, the PJS 7 address offers a practical mid-point between the two ends of Petaling Jaya. On any visit, confirm which care tier is available for the resident's dependency level, check current vacancy, and request a written fee schedule — rates are not posted online and differ by room type and care needs.

facilities.title: My Aged Care Nursing Home in PJ Old Town
facilities.editorial_summary:
My Aged Care @ PJ Old Town operates from PJS 4 in the heart of Petaling Jaya Old Town, one of PJ's most accessible locations for nursing home care. The branch sits close to Assunta Hospital and within the broader PJ healthcare corridor, reducing the logistical burden of specialist outpatients and emergency transfers for residents. It is one of several branches operated by My Aged Care Sdn Bhd, a licensed nursing home operator that has been active in Petaling Jaya since 2006. Google Maps confirms a nursing home classification for this branch, distinguishing it from the lighter retirement home categories applied to some sister properties.

My Aged Care Sdn Bhd describes its service range as spanning general assisted living, nursing care for bedridden residents, post-stroke and post-operative rehabilitation, palliative support, and respite placements. An in-house physiotherapy service — branded MAC Physio Corner — operates across the network. The operator states it was founded by medical professionals with a combined six decades of healthcare experience. Monthly fees are not published on the myagedcare.com.my website; rates depend on care level and room type, and families should request a written fee schedule when making an initial enquiry.

PJ Old Town carries a 4.8-star Google rating from 92 reviews — the highest-scoring branch in the My Aged Care network. The Old Town location has strong public transport connections and is convenient for families coming from Damansara, Kelana Jaya, or Bangsar. On enquiry, note that the branch spans premises across the Jalan Othman and Jalan Terus area — confirm the exact address for the admission you are arranging. Ask about current availability at the care level you need and request a written fee schedule, as pricing is not published online.

facilities.title: My Aged Care Nursing Home in Petaling Jaya @ Jalan Assunta
facilities.editorial_summary:
My Aged Care @ Jalan Assunta is located at 9 Jalan Assunta 4/52, Petaling Jaya, directly adjacent to Assunta Hospital — one of the most clinically advantageous positions for a nursing home in the PJ area. For residents who need regular specialist appointments, wound clinic visits, or emergency hospital access, the proximity means less time in transport and easier coordination between hospital clinical teams and the nursing home's care staff. The branch is one of several run by My Aged Care Sdn Bhd, a licensed nursing home operator in Petaling Jaya founded in 2006.

My Aged Care Sdn Bhd describes its service range as spanning general assisted living, nursing care for bedridden residents, post-stroke and post-operative rehabilitation, palliative support, and respite placements. An in-house physiotherapy service — branded MAC Physio Corner — operates across the network. The operator states it was founded by medical professionals with a combined six decades of healthcare experience. Monthly fees are not published on the myagedcare.com.my website; rates depend on care level and room type, and families should request a written fee schedule when making an initial enquiry.

The Jalan Assunta branch carries a 4.4-star Google rating from 85 reviews. Google Maps lists it as a retirement home, though the operator's service range covers skilled nursing and higher-dependency care. For families managing a relative with complex medical needs and frequent hospital contact, the Assunta Hospital adjacency is a practical consideration that sets this branch apart from other PJ options. On any visit, confirm the care tier available for the resident's profile, ask about current bed availability, and request a written fee breakdown — pricing is not listed on the operator's website.

facilities.title: AMAZING GRACE SENIOR HOME
facilities.editorial_summary:
Amazing Grace Senior Home is located at Jalan SS19/4 in SS19, Subang Jaya, serving families across the Subang Jaya, USJ, and Shah Alam corridor. It is one of two properties operating under the Amazing Grace Care Centre brand in Selangor, the other being in Section 14, Petaling Jaya. Google Maps classifies this SS19 branch as a retirement home, indicating it primarily supports residents at assisted living and lower-dependency levels rather than high-dependency skilled nursing.

Amazing Grace Senior Home carries a 5.0-star Google rating from 156 reviews — among the highest review scores for any private care facility in the Subang Jaya area. No monthly fees are published by the operator. The care profile at this SS19 branch leans toward residential and assisted living support; families whose relative requires skilled nursing, intensive wound care, or palliative medical management should confirm the specific care ceiling during an initial call or visit. The Section 14 sister branch, which holds nursing home and physiotherapy listings on Google Maps, covers a broader clinical range and may be more suitable for higher-dependency needs.

Amazing Grace has no public-facing website, so direct contact with the home is the primary research step. For families in Subang Jaya, USJ, or western Shah Alam, the SS19 address is conveniently located for regular visits. When calling, ask about current capacity, the dependency levels the home typically accepts, and the monthly fee structure — none of this information is available publicly. The consistent 5.0-star record across 156 reviews makes this home worth including on any shortlist for families seeking a retirement-style residential setting in the Subang corridor.

facilities.title: AMAZING GRACE RETIREMENT HOME
facilities.editorial_summary:
Amazing Grace Retirement Home is located at 11 Jalan 14/55 in Section 14, Petaling Jaya, and is the more clinically capable of the two Amazing Grace Care Centre branches in Selangor. Section 14 is a quiet residential neighbourhood in central PJ, within reasonable reach of Pantai Hospital Kuala Lumpur and several specialist clinics along Jalan Kemajuan. Google Maps classifies this branch as a nursing home, assisted living facility, and physiotherapy service — a wider care range than the retirement home classification applied to the SS19 sister branch, suggesting a higher clinical ceiling.

The Section 14 branch carries a 4.9-star Google rating from 140 reviews, a sustained result across a meaningful review base that gives families reasonable confidence in day-to-day care standards. The Google Maps physiotherapy listing indicates on-site or arranged rehabilitation support, which is relevant for post-stroke or post-operative residents. No monthly fees are published by the operator; pricing is not available online and must be requested directly from the home.

For families in the PJ, Bangsar, or Damansara area who need a nursing home capable of managing higher-dependency residents, this Section 14 branch is worth prioritising on your viewing shortlist. The combination of nursing home classification, physiotherapy services, and a strong review record suggests a care ceiling above that of a typical retirement home. Amazing Grace has no public website, so the home's own team is the primary information source. Ask about current availability, the nursing and medical services provided, and the monthly fee schedule — and arrange a viewing before ruling it in or out on price alone.

facilities.title: Mintygreen Nursing Home(Sungai Long & Kajang ElderCare Center) 加影碧绿疗养院
facilities.editorial_summary:
Mintygreen's Sungai Long branch — marketed as the Kajang ElderCare Center — operates from Landmark Residences 2, Jalan Sungai Long, Bandar Sungai Long, Kajang, serving the southern Klang Valley catchment from Balakong and Seri Kembangan through to Kajang town. It is one of the established branches in the Mintygreen Healthcare Group's Klang Valley network, a Malaysian eldercare chain founded in 2017 that began in a bungalow in Desa Permai before expanding to the current shophouse facility in Sungai Long. The group has since grown to multiple locations across Kajang, Cheras, Kepong, and Subang Jaya.

Mintygreen's care model runs across three tiers — assisted living for ambulant seniors, standard nursing for those needing daily medical support, and higher-dependency care for bedridden residents. The group describes itself as the first senior care chain in Malaysia to integrate Traditional Chinese Medicine (TCM) as a core programme, covering acupuncture, herbal therapy, and TCM-based rehabilitation alongside conventional nursing. Monthly fees are not published on the mintygreen-wellness.com website; pricing varies by care level, room type, and branch. Contact the specific branch directly and ask for a written fee schedule before committing.

The Sungai Long Kajang branch holds a 4.6-star rating from 108 Google reviews — one of the stronger review records among Klang Valley nursing homes at this volume. Google Maps classifies the facility under nursing home, nursing agency, and physical therapist categories, confirming both the rehabilitation and skilled nursing components. This branch suits families in Kajang, Seri Kembangan, Bandar Sungai Long, and eastern Cheras. On visiting, ask about the TCM care plan structure, confirm the dependency range accepted at this branch, and request a written fee schedule.

facilities.title: Mintygreen Senior Care Center Cheras(Sungai Long) 蕉赖碧绿疗养院
facilities.editorial_summary:
Mintygreen Senior Care Center in the Cheras-Sungai Long corridor sits within the Kajang area of Selangor, close to the Cheras-Kajang administrative boundary. It is part of the Mintygreen Healthcare Group, a Malaysian eldercare chain founded in 2017 with branches across the Klang Valley. Google Maps classifies this branch as a retirement home, medical centre, and nursing home — a broad category set indicating a care range from residential assisted living through to skilled nursing. It is a smaller, community-level branch in the Mintygreen network, distinct from the group's main Bandar Sungai Long headquarters facility located nearby.

Mintygreen's care model runs across three tiers — assisted living for ambulant seniors, standard nursing for those needing daily medical support, and higher-dependency care for bedridden residents. The group describes itself as the first senior care chain in Malaysia to integrate Traditional Chinese Medicine (TCM) as a core programme, covering acupuncture, herbal therapy, and TCM-based rehabilitation alongside conventional nursing. Monthly fees are not published on the mintygreen-wellness.com website; pricing varies by care level, room type, and branch. Contact the specific branch directly and ask for a written fee schedule before committing.

With 13 Google reviews at a 4.7-star average, the branch has a smaller but consistently positive review trail. The medical centre classification on Google Maps suggests some clinical infrastructure beyond basic residential care. For families in the Cheras Batu 11 corridor, Taman Segar, or the Kajang town fringe, this branch offers a local option without the drive to the larger Sungai Long headquarters. On a visit, ask about the nursing staff roster, the dependency levels routinely accepted, and how the TCM programme is structured for this branch specifically.

facilities.title: Mintygreen Nursing & Retirement Home (Kepong and PJ Bandar Sri Damansara)
facilities.editorial_summary:
Mintygreen's Bandar Sri Damansara branch is located at Sphere Damansara, Jalan PJU 10/9 in Prima Damansara — a commercial estate on the Selangor-KL boundary that draws families from both the Kepong and northern Petaling Jaya corridors. The branch is part of the Mintygreen Healthcare Group, a Malaysian eldercare chain founded in 2017 and operating multiple branches across the Klang Valley. Its Prima Damansara address makes it accessible from Kepong Baru, Segambut, Damansara Damai, and the northern stretches of PJ without requiring a lengthy drive on major expressways.

Mintygreen's care model runs across three tiers — assisted living for ambulant seniors, standard nursing for those needing daily medical support, and higher-dependency care for bedridden residents. The group describes itself as the first senior care chain in Malaysia to integrate Traditional Chinese Medicine (TCM) as a core programme, covering acupuncture, herbal therapy, and TCM-based rehabilitation alongside conventional nursing. Monthly fees are not published on the mintygreen-wellness.com website; pricing varies by care level, room type, and branch. Contact the specific branch directly and ask for a written fee schedule before committing.

The Bandar Sri Damansara branch carries a 4.1-star Google rating from 50 reviews. Google Maps classifies it as nursing home, retirement community, and retirement home — confirming coverage across dependency levels from assisted living through to skilled nursing. For families evaluating options in this part of the Klang Valley, the 50-review sample provides a reasonable baseline on care consistency. On visiting, ask specifically about the overnight nursing roster, the dependency range routinely accepted, and whether the TCM programme runs on the same schedule as at the larger network sites.

facilities.title: Mintygreen Care Suites - Home Care Nursing Cheras KL
facilities.editorial_summary:
Mintygreen Care Suites Cheras is located at 100 Jalan Cheras, Phoenix Business Park, Kuala Lumpur, a short distance from Taman Connaught MRT and on the Cheras-Kajang Expressway corridor. It is the most urban format in the Mintygreen group, operating from a commercial suite building designed around individual room configurations rather than the converted-bungalow layout common among Cheras nursing homes. The hotel-style setup provides more privacy than ward-format facilities, which is particularly relevant for short-term rehabilitation or post-operative stays. The corporate entity is Mintygreen Care Suites Cheras Sdn Bhd.

Mintygreen's care model runs across three tiers — assisted living for ambulant seniors, standard nursing for those needing daily medical support, and higher-dependency care for bedridden residents. The group describes itself as the first senior care chain in Malaysia to integrate Traditional Chinese Medicine (TCM) as a core programme, covering acupuncture, herbal therapy, and TCM-based rehabilitation alongside conventional nursing. Monthly fees are not published on the mintygreen-wellness.com website; pricing varies by care level, room type, and branch. Contact the specific branch directly and ask for a written fee schedule before committing.

Mintygreen Care Suites Cheras holds a 4.8-star Google rating from 22 reviews. The suite format is particularly suitable for families whose relative wants private accommodation, or for post-operative and rehabilitation cases expecting a shorter placement. The Cheras KL address is convenient for Hospital Cheras and Columbia Asia Hospital Cheras, supporting both emergency transfers and specialist outpatient access. When enquiring, ask for the suite-rate schedule by room type, confirm the care level your relative needs, and check current availability — fees are not published online.

facilities.title: Mintygreen Care Centre @ USJ21, Subang Jaya
facilities.editorial_summary:
Mintygreen Care Centre @ USJ21 is located at 1 Jalan USJ 21/10 in UEP Subang Jaya, the most westerly branch in the Mintygreen Healthcare Group's Klang Valley network. The USJ21 address provides good road access to Subang Jaya Medical Centre (SJMC) and specialist clinics in the Subang-Sunway corridor, which is practical for residents with ongoing medical appointments. Like all Mintygreen branches, it operates under the group's integrated care model pairing conventional nursing with Traditional Chinese Medicine (TCM) as a standard programme rather than an optional add-on.

Mintygreen's care model runs across three tiers — assisted living for ambulant seniors, standard nursing for those needing daily medical support, and higher-dependency care for bedridden residents. The group describes itself as the first senior care chain in Malaysia to integrate Traditional Chinese Medicine (TCM) as a core programme, covering acupuncture, herbal therapy, and TCM-based rehabilitation alongside conventional nursing. Monthly fees are not published on the mintygreen-wellness.com website; pricing varies by care level, room type, and branch. Contact the specific branch directly and ask for a written fee schedule before committing.

With a single Google review at 5.0 stars, the online record for this branch is too limited to draw conclusions from — it confirms the facility exists at this address, but not much about care quality. This branch is the natural Mintygreen choice for families in USJ, Sunway, Puchong, or Shah Alam. As a smaller, newer branch, bed count and overnight nursing cover are worth confirming directly before arranging a viewing. Ask about which care tiers are actively running, current capacity, and the full fee schedule broken down by care level — none of these details are published online.

facilities.title: Mintygreen Nursing Home (ElderCare Center)
facilities.editorial_summary:
Mintygreen Nursing Home in Sungai Long is the headquarters branch of the Mintygreen Healthcare Group, a Malaysian eldercare chain founded in 2017. The facility occupies a six-shophouse block at Landmark Residences 2, Bandar Sungai Long, Kajang — the group's first permanent site, opened after an initial start in a Desa Permai bungalow. It serves the southern Klang Valley catchment across Kajang, Balakong, and Seri Kembangan, and functions as the anchor of a network now extending to multiple locations across the Klang Valley. The 4.6-star Google rating from more than 100 reviews reflects a care record built across several years of operation.

Mintygreen's care model runs across three tiers — assisted living for ambulant seniors, standard nursing for those needing daily medical support, and higher-dependency care for bedridden residents. The group describes itself as the first senior care chain in Malaysia to integrate Traditional Chinese Medicine (TCM) as a core programme, covering acupuncture, herbal therapy, and TCM-based rehabilitation alongside conventional nursing. Monthly fees are not published on the mintygreen-wellness.com website; pricing varies by care level, room type, and branch. Contact the specific branch directly and ask for a written fee schedule before committing.

As the headquarters branch, Sungai Long carries the most established clinical and TCM infrastructure in the Mintygreen network and the longest operational history. Google Maps classifies this listing as a nursing home. The branch suits families in Kajang, Bandar Sungai Long, Seri Kembangan, and Balakong. On a visit, ask about bed configuration, overnight nursing staffing levels, and how the TCM programme is scheduled across the week. Request a written fee breakdown by care tier, as pricing is not available online.
